data.content: Approved in implementation_review. Verified the history label now derives from explicit response metadata/provider-model fields instead of unrelated nested ids, so OpenRouter-backed responses keep their provider/model identity and sessions without response metadata still fall back to the session-start agent label. Confirmed the new SessionCard regression test is discovered via the widened Vitest include for .test.tsx files, and the parser tests cover both metadata override and no-metadata fallback. Sanity gates passed in /Users/cartine/foolery/.worktrees/foolery-b45e: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
